title: Smooth FPS
description: Experience Minecraft with enhanced performance, a smoother interface, and convenient quality-of-life mods!
body:
**Welcome to the Smooth FPS Modpack!**

this meticulously curated modpack is designed to deliver a seamless and optimized Minecraft adventure. Focusing on somewhat improved performance, a smoother interface, and select quality-of-life enhancements, Smooth FPS offers an elevated gameplay experience without overwhelming your system.
Key Features:
________________________________________________________________

Optimized Performance:
Enjoy a slight boost in FPS with a collection of performance-enhancing mods, ensuring a smooth and lag-free experience.
________________________________________________________________

Smoother Interface:
Quite literally, a smoother interface. Everything you do is designed to feel smooth and fluid.
________________________________________________________________

Quality of Life Improvements:
Benefit from carefully selected mods that add convenience and efficiency to your gameplay, including Zoom, Improved Sounds, Fancy Eating Animations, and more.
________________________________________________________________

Lightweight and Efficient:
Designed to run efficiently on a wide range of systems, Smooth FPS ensures you can enjoy a rich Minecraft experience without the need for high-end hardware.
________________________________________________________________

Dive into Smooth FPS and rediscover Minecraft with slight improved performance, a smoother interface, and enhanced convenience. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to Minecraft, this modpack offers the perfect blend of simplicity and added details without costing you any performance.

-made by kirbyiskool (1.20+)
IF ANYTHING BREAKS DM ME ON DISCORD: kirbyoui
